title: Notifications - Onboarding - Don't Allow, dialog - Cancel then Go to Settings
scenario: User denies notifications during onboarding, then attempts to enable them from in-app settings, triggering a dialog with Cancel and Go to Settings options.
steps: 1. During onboarding, do not allow notifications.
2. Navigate to App Settings > General > Notifications.
4. Observe the dialog that appears with 'Cancel' and 'Go to Settings' buttons.
5. Tap 'Cancel' and verify the user returns to the Notifications tab.
6. Tap 'Go to Settings' and verify the iOS OS Notification settings open.
expected: Tapping Cancel returns the user to the Notifications tab. Tapping Go to Settings opens the iOS OS Notification settings.
